product_assemblies_price_kind_check.name: product_assemblies_price_kind_check
product_assemblies_price_kind_check.value: ("product_assemblies"."kind" = 'standard' AND "product_assemblies"."price" IS NULL) OR ("product_assemblies"."kind" = 'optional' AND "product_assemblies"."price" IS NOT NULL AND "product_assemblies"."price" >= 0)
